LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Grenade.label: arrow (grenade)
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Grenade.description: Simple arrow design with a cutting head attached to a wooden shaft.
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Molotov.label: arrow (molotov)
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Molotov.description: Simple arrow design with a cutting head attached to a wooden shaft.
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_EMP.label: arrow (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_EMP.description: Simple arrow design with a cutting head attached to a wooden shaft.
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Battery.label: arrow (battery)
LanguageData.Ammo_Arrow_Battery.description: Simple arrow design with a cutting head attached to a wooden shaft.
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Grenade.label: great arrow (grenade)
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Grenade.description: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a great bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Molotov.label: great arrow (molotov)
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Molotov.description: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a great bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_EMP.label: great arrow (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_EMP.description: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a great bow.
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Battery.label: great arrow (battery)
LanguageData.Ammo_GreatArrow_Battery.description: Heavy arrow designed to be fired from a great bow.

LanguageData.Projectile_Arrow_Molotov.label: arrow (bowlotov)
LanguageData.Projectile_Arrow_EMP.label: arrow (bowMP)
